page1.title: Organize Your Equipment
page1.description: Keep track of all your film equipment in one place. Add photos, link RFID tags, and find items instantly.
page1.feature1: Add equipment with photos and details
page1.feature2: Link RFID tags for quick scanning

page2.title: Plan Productions Easily
page2.description: Create jobs for your productions and assign the equipment you need. Verify on-set that everything is present.
page2.feature2: Live Scan to verify all items are present

page3.title: Collaborate with Your Team
page3.description: Work together with your crew. Share equipment across your company and track who has what.
page3.feature1: Create companies and invite team members
page3.feature2: Cloud sync across all your devices
page3.feature3: Works offline when you need it

ble.noDevicesHint: Make sure Bluetooth is enabled and your scanner is turned on
ble.permissionRequiredMessage: This app needs Bluetooth permissions to connect to scanners. Please allow access in settings.

pairingFailure.title: Scanner pairing failed
pairingFailure.message: The scanner requested a Bluetooth pairing that wasn't completed, so the connection is blocked.

pairingHelp.title: Fix scanner pairing
pairingHelp.body:
Pick one of the following:

1. Remove pairing in iOS
   • iOS Settings → Bluetooth
   • Tap (i) next to the scanner
   • Choose "Forget This Device"
   • Reconnect inside this app
   • When iOS shows the pairing prompt, tap "Pair"

2. Factory reset the scanner
   • In this app, open Settings → Scanner
   • Tap "Factory reset"
   • Reconnect the scanner

Note: The first time you connect you must accept iOS' pairing prompt. If you ignore it, the connection gets stuck.

ble.locationPermissionMessage:
To find and connect Bluetooth scanners, Android requires location permission.

⚠️ WITHOUT this permission, you CANNOT connect to scanners!

✅ WITH this permission:
  • Scanners are found and displayed
  • Connection is possible

🔒 Your location data is NOT stored or shared.
This permission is only required by Android.
ble.locationPermissionDeniedMessage:
Location permission is required to find Bluetooth scanners.

⚠️ Without this permission you CANNOT connect scanners!

Please enable the permission in app settings:
1. Open Settings
2. Select TakeReady
3. Enable Location
ble.bluetoothDisabledMessage: Please enable Bluetooth to scan for devices.
